# Amrich Pharma

> Way to Go Ahead — Aquaculture Health & Care. Eco-safe probiotics, water quality solutions, and disease management for shrimp & fish farming across coastal India.

## About

Amrich Pharma, based in Mumbai, India, provides scientifically formulated aquaculture products to shrimp and fish farmers across 5 coastal Indian states (AP, TN, Gujarat, Odisha, WB). Founded in 2015, trusted by 3,000+ farmers.

## Products — 4 categories, 16 products

### Probiotics & Soil Care
- PRO PLUS — Soil probiotic, degrades detritus, prevents black soil (5 kg bucket)
- FARM PRO — Liquid probiotic, stabilizes water color within 48 hours (1 L bottle)
- FARM-PS — Phosphate-solubilizing probiotic, converts bound phosphates (1 L bottle)
- GUT-X — Gut health probiotic, reduces FCR, suppresses Vibrio (500 g pouch)

### Disease & Stress Management
- SHRIMP CARE — All-in-one health pack, pre-measured doses (6 packs/box)
- FARM-C+ — Stress recovery & immunity vitamin blend (500 g pouch)
- FARMADINE — Iodine-based disease control, Blackgill/Browngill (1 L bottle)
- FARM 80% — Pond disinfectant, Benzyl Konium Chloride 80% (5 L can)

### Feed & Pond Preparers
- GRO-BIND — Feed binding gel, prevents pellet disintegration (1 L bottle)
- OMEGA-BOOSTER — Growth & immunity supplement (1 L / 1 kg)
- FARMAMIN — Pond fertility & mineral balancer (1 kg pouch)
- BLOOMER — Plankton bloom regulator, stable diatom/algae growth (5 kg pouch)

### Water Quality & Ammonia Control
- OXY-FARM — DO & nitrification support, Paracoccus spp. (1 kg)
- GASO CLEAN — Ammonia & nitrite remover, herbal + nitrifying bacteria (1 L can)
- W-SOFTENER — Water conditioner, alkalinity balancer (1 kg pouch)
- EASY LITE — Metabolic & oxygen utilization support (500 g / 1 L)

## Technical

All products are:
- Lab-tested and certified
- Environmentally safe
- Formulated by aquaculture scientists
- Backed by technical support across 5 coastal Indian states
